name: Mutual Fund Return Calculator
description: Estimate returns from mutual funds over time.

example.explanation: An investment growing from ₹50,000 to ₹82,000 represents a 64% return or ₹32,000 gain.

faqs.question: What return does this show?
faqs.answer: It shows the percentage gain or loss between the starting and ending values.

faqs.question: Does it include costs?
faqs.answer: No, this assumes the values already include any fees or charges.

faqs.question: How is this useful?
faqs.answer: It helps you evaluate mutual fund performance and compare different investments.
